auditor_notes.read_only_fact_check: Herschel verified the final design package manifest contains 35 screens 00-34, current SCREENS remains overview/accounts/api-connections/diagnostics/settings/setup/select-client/import-existing, static data-ui-action values remain bounded, and old passports are stale relative to final package ids.
auditor_notes.remote_auditor_failure_handling: A later remote audit attempt failed or timed out due infrastructure stream issues and was not counted as a PASS. Deterministic local checks were used as machine evidence instead.
auditor_notes.implementation_change: No implementation change was required by this contour.

checks.name: single_status_per_screen
checks.evidence: Every matrix screen has one final_status in implemented, partial, inert-deferred, reference-only, admission-required, desktop-only-after-owner-approval.

checks.name: desktop_gate
checks.evidence: desktop_approval_granted is false and DESKTOP_RENDERER_ADMISSION remains owner-gated in the next-contour queue.

checks.name: dangerous_screen_admission
checks.evidence: Route builder, secret selector, rollout scale, evidence packets, runtime attestation, activity history, and recovery center remain admission-required or owner-gated; none are implemented by visual design presence alone.

checks.name: scope_boundary
checks.evidence: Generated files are audit_results artifacts only. No command adapter, live server, runtime, backend, external-models, or desktop files are changed.

checks.name: external_reference_trace_scan
checks.evidence: No forbidden external reference service traces or private package paths were found in the generated contour artifacts.

residual_risks: This contour does not implement missing screens; it only reconciles final design inventory and admissibility.
Some screens marked partial may need stricter admission before becoming separate full screens.
